title: Infosys expands multi-year collaboration with GlobalFoundries for AI-led managed IT services
detailed_summary: Infosys announced an expanded multi-year collaboration with GlobalFoundries to provide AI-led managed services across GlobalFoundries' enterprise IT landscape. Under the engagement, Infosys will manage end-to-end application, infrastructure, data and service desk operations. The collaboration is intended to move GlobalFoundries from externally supported operations to a managed services model driven by AI, automation and continuous optimization, with stated goals including reduced incidents, improved end-user experience, lower long-term total cost of ownership, and a shift toward predictive and autonomous service delivery. No contract value was disclosed.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NYSE: INFY), a global leader in AI-first business consulting and technology services, today announced an expanded multi-year collaboration with GlobalFoundries (NASDAQ: GFS) (GF), a leading semiconductor manufacturer, to deliver AI-led managed services across GF's enterprise IT landscape.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Announces Expanded Collaboration with GlobalFoundries to Accelerate AI-Driven Transformation of IT Operations

important_text_spans.text: Through this collaboration, Infosys will manage GF's end-to-end application, infrastructure, data and service desk operations.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Infosys Announces Expanded Collaboration with GlobalFoundries to Accelerate AI-Driven Transformation of IT Operations

important_text_spans.text: The engagement is designed to elevate GF's IT operations by transitioning from externally supported operations to a true managed services model driven by AI, automation, and continuous optimization.
